market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: £210/night 3 Bed House Perfect for Families, 20% above the city median
Cozy Family Villa, 4 Guests, 76 Open Nights, Prices £210
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to our spacious 3-bedroom house, perfect for families and groups of up to 4 guests! Located in the heart of London, this villa offers a relaxing retreat with plenty of space to spread out. With 76 open nights available throughout the next 90 days, you can enjoy a flexible stay without worrying about availability. Our house is fully furnished and equipped with everything you need for a comfortable stay. Located just a short walk from local shops, restaurants, and pubs, it's the perfect base for exploring the city. Whether you're here for business or pleasure, our house is the perfect choice for a relaxing and enjoyable stay.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space would be highly desirable for a house of this size and price point in this area.
Additional amenities such as a washing machine and dryer would be highly valued by long-stay guests.
A separate living area with TV and entertainment facilities would enhance the overall guest experience.
analysis.photo_order_rec: First, showcase the spacious living room and comfortable furnishings to establish a sense of relaxation and comfort. Then, lead to the private bedrooms and well-appointed bathrooms.
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate is £210, 20% above the median rate of £175 in the same market, which may be deterring guests.
Occupancy stands at 15.2%, significantly below the cohort average of 28.3%, indicating a gap in attracting bookings.
With 6 reviews, the host has barely begun to build credibility, which can negatively impact guest confidence.
analysis.outreach_hook: Amaan, I noticed your listing has an opportunity to increase occupancy by 13.1% by matching the cohort average, would you like to discuss potential enhancements?
